The bill-wise breakup of the said amount is enclosed with this letter.
If we do not receive your confirmation within 10 days from the date of
Please note that if no reply is received within a fortnight, the balance
will then be assumed to have been accepted by you as shown above.
Your reply within the given period will be highly appreciated.
